doc: Declarative spec. The agent substitutes <placeholders> and EXECUTES. n-gram mining needs the FULL search-terms report (the long tail IS the signal), so pull a high limit. MCP paths: ../../../../_framework/porter-mcp-calls.md

queries.big_result: persist to file as data.json {columns, rows}

context.doc: Per-account input. brand/competitor seed the separation; target_cpa / roas_breakeven set the waste/winning bar; thresholds are recall knobs (lean loose, the LLM filters).

process: process.py data.json context.json  ->  { meta, waste[], winning[], rollup }
llm_step: write the 3-string synthesis; ADJUDICATE every waste n-gram with needs_confirm (broad/rides_brand/competitor/has_some_conversions) before recommending its negative — a flagged one downgrades to review; sanity-check winning n-grams aren't just brand head terms.
